name: ai-creative-subagent-framework
description: AI Creative Production Sub-Agent Orchestration Framework — dispatch director, art director, cinematographer, brand director, and AI artist agents for script breakdown, visual design, brand compliance, and AI image/video generation workflows.

agents.name: creative-director
agents.description: Overall project director who manages and orchestrates sub-agents

agents.name: director-agent
agents.description: Script decomposition, creative concept development, storyboard creation

agents.name: art-director-agent
agents.description: Scene visual design, tone and color scheme, visual references, mood board

agents.name: dop-agent
agents.description: Camera movement design, composition, lighting setup

agents.name: brand-director-agent
agents.description: Brand strategy review, compliance check, visual consistency audit

agents.name: ai-artist-agent
agents.description: Technical feasibility assessment, prompt engineering, quality control
